name: Grover Ironfoot
sd_appearance: A diminutive yet commanding figure, roughly the size of a stool, stands amidst the sprawling marketplace of the Undercity. Grover Ironfoot, a halfling acquisition agent for the Iron Fang Consortium, is clad in a deep burgundy coat, the subtle emblem of his faction adorning the lapel. His skin, a rich, weathered tan from countless hours spent navigating the city's labyrinthine corridors, is framed by a shock of raven-black hair. His large, expressive eyes, a piercing hazel, are set off by a prominent scar that runs down the left side of his face. Hidden beneath his coat, a concealed blade and crossbow are ever-present, a testament to his mercantile-military role. One distinctive visual detail that sets him apart is a delicate, golden locket, always worn around his neck, a memento of his late wife, a constant reminder of his motivation to rise through the ranks.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: mercantile-military — expensive but practical, always armed, never obviously so
